# KevinBravo.com

Kevin Bravo is a software engineer focused on backend engineering, infrastructure, AI engineering, and full-stack product work.

This file is an agent navigation aid. It summarizes important public URLs on the site, but crawler permissions are defined by robots.txt.

## Canonical Site

- https://kevinbravo.com/

## High-Value Pages

- https://kevinbravo.com/ - Homepage and portfolio overview for Kevin Bravo.
- https://kevinbravo.com/me/ama - Primary profile page with background, strengths, role fit, and technical interests.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects - Project and case-study index.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects/billingua-talent - Full-stack platform case study for bilingual professional talent.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects/sea - Full-stack advisory operations platform case study.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects/sep - Education operations platform case study.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects/avaa-power-bi-dashboard - Data analytics dashboard case study.
- https://kevinbravo.com/0b - Technical writing index.
- https://kevinbravo.com/rss.xml - RSS feed for technical writing.
- https://kevinbravo.com/projects.json - Machine-readable project index.

## Notes For Agents

- The site is optimized for hiring and technical evaluation contexts.
- Some older technical articles are mirrored locally but keep Hashnode as their canonical source.
- Primary topics are backend systems, infrastructure, AI engineering, full-stack engineering, data systems, and blockchain/security where relevant.
